message:
Add errdefer cleanup to primary and literal parsers

- Fix parseFString to track and clean up converted parts on error
- Add errdefer to parseEmbeddedExpr for expression node
- Add errdefer to parseAwait, parseUnaryMinus, parseUnaryPlus, parseBitwiseNot
- Fix parseGroupedOrTuple to properly clean up elements on error
- Fix parseList to use errdefer instead of defer and clean up elements
- Fix parseListComp to properly track and clean up generators/ifs on error
- Fix parseDict to use errdefer for keys, values, and set elements
- Fix parseDictComp to properly track and clean up key/value/generators

This reduces Flask import leaks from 25 to 21 while maintaining 0 leaks
for simple files and blinker imports.
